details.test: Task 1: Start booking cheapest breakfast room for June weekend
Task 2: Create restaurant reservation for four at earliest available evening time
Task 3: Start booking highest-rated spa package under $400/night
Task 4: Purchase $150 restaurant gift card for email delivery
Task 5: Submit corporate meeting inquiry for 20 attendees
Task 6: Build vegetarian dinner plan (1 appetizer, 2 mains, 1 dessert)
Task 7: Choose room with largest bed under $250/night for solo business stay
Task 8: Sign up for newsletter with room & restaurant interests (monthly)
